<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is safe, while the lava at row 03 column C is below and not in my path. Moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column D, which is safe and brings me closer to the goal, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D, facing right. The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but moving straight down from here would require passing through row 03 column D, which is safe, and then reaching the goal below. Since I am currently facing right, I need to turn right twice to face down, but I can only turn one step at a time. The best next move is to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, directly ahead. The cell below me at row 03 column D is safe (`.`), so I should move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing down. The goal O is directly below me at row 04 column D, so moving forward will take me safely onto the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
